name: emmy-governance-docs
description: Develop, review, draft, and approval-gate Emmy governance documents using the SFIV Governance registry standard.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, review, and draft governance docs.
interface.longDescription: Adds Emmy-specific workflows for developing governance ideas through interactive dialog, reviewing governance documents for approval readiness, and drafting Confluence governance documents from already-developed systems, processes, policies, or operating models. Uses the SFIV Governance parent page, the governance label, targeted Knowledge Store lookup, and explicit approval gates for Confluence writes.
